attributes.description: Traffic analysis, request patterns, and capacity planning for Nginx.

params.markdown:
## Traffic & Capacity

Analyze NGINX traffic patterns and plan for capacity.

- **Status codes**: Response code distribution over time
- **Top URLs**: Busiest endpoints with error counts
- **Top clients**: Highest-volume source IPs
- **HTTP methods & versions**: Request method and protocol mix
- **Capacity metrics**: Active connections, requests, and throughput trends

panelsJSON.title: Requests by Status Code Over Time

attributes.title: [Nginx OTel] Traffic & Capacity
